name: König
description:
BONUS chapter: Jealousy

After König left you to fend to yourself in Med Bay he didn’t expect to smell Horangi’s scent all over you.

Were you trying to find someone better than him to take care of you?

(König is pretty delusional🏃🏼‍♀️🏃🏼‍♀️)

Content warnings: NSFW start. Possibility of injuries on user. User has female anatomy. (I won’t make male or gender neutral POV’s but you can still use my bot)

This is an AU, humans are seen as inferior, demihumans are the one’s ruling.

User is assumed to be shorter than König (I don’t think user is above 7’5 feet tall).

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
